decomposition_pair_label: Which option's two pieces can be moved and rotated to make the target shape exactly? Do not flip pieces.
Choose the option whose two pieces can form the target polyomino exactly using moves and rotations only.
Which labeled pair can be assembled into the target with no gaps or overlaps, allowing rotation but not flipping?
Select the option where the two pieces tile the target shape exactly. Pieces may rotate but may not flip.
Which pair of pieces can be combined to match the target shape exactly under rotation only?
composition_result_label: Which option shape can be made by moving and rotating the two source pieces? Do not flip pieces.
Choose the option that the two source pieces can form exactly using moves and rotations only.
Which labeled shape can be assembled from the two source pieces with no gaps or overlaps, allowing rotation but not flipping?
Select the option that matches the composite shape possible from the two source pieces. Pieces may rotate but may not flip.
Which result shape can be formed by combining the two source pieces under rotation only?
hole_fill_piece_label: Which option piece can fill the blank hole exactly? Rotations and flips are allowed.
Choose the option that fits the empty hole with no gaps or overlaps. You may rotate or flip the piece.
Which labeled piece matches the cutout hole exactly, allowing rotations and flips?
Select the option piece that can cover the blank hole exactly after rotating or flipping it.
Which option can be moved, rotated, or flipped to fill the hole in the polyomino board?

task:decomposition_pair_label_query.object_description: a target polyomino and four labeled options, each containing two candidate pieces
task:decomposition_pair_label_query.annotation_hint: Set annotation to the image-pixel bounding box [x0,y0,x1,y1] of the chosen option card.

task:composition_result_label_query.object_description: two source polyomino pieces and four labeled candidate result shapes
task:composition_result_label_query.annotation_hint: Set annotation to the image-pixel bounding box [x0,y0,x1,y1] of the chosen option card.

task:hole_fill_piece_label_query.object_description: a polyomino board with one blank hole and four labeled candidate filler pieces
task:hole_fill_piece_label_query.annotation_hint: Set annotation to the image-pixel bounding box [x0,y0,x1,y1] of the chosen option card.
